reviews.comment:
The coffee at this café was a huge letdown. It tasted burnt and bitter, and it was barely warm by the time it reached my table. For the price, I expected something much fresher and better prepared. Definitely not ordering it again.
You must hire a well trained barista who knows how to make coffee

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for sharing this in detail. What you’ve described isn’t the experience we aim to deliver, especially on brew quality and temperature. We’ve noted this internally and are reviewing preparation and barista execution at the outlet. If you’re open to it, please DM us your contact details on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to hello@coffeeisland.in so we can understand this better.
